name: image-template-social-media-post-cinematic-elevator-scene
title: Social Media Post - Cinematic Elevator Scene
description: A prompt for generating a moody, cinematic scene of a woman inside a metallic elevator with realistic lighting and reflections.

query.en: Inside an elevator, the metal walls have a slight cold reflection, and the ceiling lights are whitish but uneven. The space is enclosed and quiet. A {argument name="subject" default="young Asian girl"} stands in a corner position of the elevator, with a background of slightly distorted mirrors and floor lights.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Inside an elevator, the metal walls have a slight cold reflection, and the ceiling lights are whitish but uneven. The space is enclosed and quiet. A {argument name="subject" default="young Asian girl"} stands in a corner position of the elevator, with a background of slightly distorted mirrors and floor lights.
